类的使用
org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.ProviderBuilder

  • 使用ProviderBuilder的程序包 
    程序包 说明
    org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap  
    org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders
    A bunch of builder classes to facilitate programming of raw API.

    • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap中ProviderBuilder的使用

      类型变量类型为ProviderBuilder的org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap中的方法参数 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      DubboBootstrap DubboBootstrap.provider(Consumer<ProviderBuilder> builderConsumer) 
      DubboBootstrap DubboBootstrap.provider(String id, Consumer<ProviderBuilder> builderConsumer)

      限定符和类型 方法和说明

      ProviderBuilder ProviderBuilder.codec(String codec)

      ProviderBuilder ProviderBuilder.exchanger(String exchanger) 
      ProviderBuilder ProviderBuilder.host(String host) 
      ProviderBuilder ProviderBuilder.ioThreads(Integer ioThreads) 
      ProviderBuilder ProviderBuilder.isDefault(Boolean isDefault)
